top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Rise Following Chip Rally, Oil Slips: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks gained as investors piled back into semiconductor stocks on renewed optimism over AI-driven demand. Oil fell.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: China AI Star Zhipu’s ‘Low Float’ Risk Persists After Share Sale
top_signals.summary: China’s hottest AI stock Zhipu may continue to see wild swings as the company’s $4 billion equities fundraising does little to meaningfully boost its thin pool of publicly tradable shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Police investigate £500,000 in Reform UK donations by mother of Farage aide
top_signals.summary: Officers have been looking at possible offences relating to alleged ‘evasion of restrictions on donations’
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: From threats to praise, Trump keeps allies guessing at NATO summit
top_signals.summary: NATO leaders, who endured a roller coaster at last year's summit, have grown accustomed to coaxing out a friendlier U.S. President Donald ⁠Trump, through flattery if need be.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
